messages.message: React Hook useEffect has missing dependencies: 'FilmGrainShader', 'UnpremultiplyPass', 'baseVertexShader', 'fragmentShader', and 'maxDevicePixelRatio'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [trailLength, inertia, grainIntensity, bloomStrength, bloomRadius, bloomThreshold, pixelBudget, fadeDelay, fadeDuration, isTouch, color, brightness, mixBlendMode, edgeIntensity, baseVertexShader, fragmentShader, FilmGrainShader, UnpremultiplyPass, maxDevicePixelRatio]

fix.text: [trailLength, inertia, grainIntensity, bloomStrength, bloomRadius, bloomThreshold, pixelBudget, fadeDelay, fadeDuration, isTouch, color, brightness, mixBlendMode, edgeIntensity, baseVertexShader, fragmentShader, FilmGrainShader, UnpremultiplyPass, maxDevicePixelRatio]
